title: SVILUPPO DI ISTRUZIONI OPERATIVE RELATIVE AI REQUISITI ORGANIZZATIVI E DELLE ATTREZZATURE DEDICATE ALLE VACCINAZIONI IN ALLEVAMENTO AVICOLO
description: A set of operational instructions outlining organizational and equipment requirements for conducting vaccinations in poultry farms. It provides detailed biosecurity protocols for dedicated vaccination areas, cleaning and disinfection of tools, vaccine storage, and safe disposal of vaccine waste.
